calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-01-2026 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-28-2026 Continued To May-26-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Compel Compliance With Supoena
Off Calendar Dec-03-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (by Zoom):
Paul Frassetto, Esq. 415-307-5383 Frassetto Law Offices for Plaintiff.
Michelle Batista, Esq. 650-368-4662 Aaron, Riechert Carpol & Riffle APC for Non-party Cathy Cho.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED. Mr. Frassetto is content with the court's TR. Ms. Batista contests and presents arguments; 3 poits; applicability, broad scope, reasonableness of timeframe request.
The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF JANE DOE's Motion To Compel Compliance With Subpoena.

Taken under Submission.***

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court signs an order. (see scanned order for details)***
